top_signals.title: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
top_signals.summary: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
